title: phymatodes cuspidata
intro: Phymatodes cuspidata, also known as Spiny Puffball or Spiny Earthball, is a type of fungus belonging to the family Morchellaceae. Traditionally, the Spiny Earthball has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this fungus include potential uses in treating wounds, skin conditions, and even certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Phymatodes cuspidata include tinctures and decoctions, which can be used to extract its bioactive compounds for medicinal purposes.
